what_makes_it_unique: Ocean Blue offers a sophisticated, upscale seafood dining experience with a focus on fresh, high-quality ingredients in an elegant setting. It provides a refined alternative to other specialty dining options onboard.
warnings: Pricing is à la carte, meaning individual menu items are priced, rather than a single fixed cover charge or surcharge. A typical meal can range from $40-$70+ per person, excluding drinks and gratuities, depending on selections.
While originally developed with Chef Geoffrey Zakarian, his direct daily involvement in the restaurant's operation is historical, though the concept and quality standards remain.
